---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for YourTripPlanner
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
Please describe the problem (e.g., "I want to be able to save multiple itineraries for different cities").

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Tech Stack Implications
Does this proposal involve:
- [ ] **AI/Gemini**: New prompt logic or model parameters?
- [ ] **Frontend**: New React components or Framer Motion animations?
- [ ] **Backend**: New Express API routes or MongoDB schemas?

## Mockups (Optional)
If you have a design idea or a reference UI, upload it here.

## Why is this important?
Explain the value this brings to travelers using the platform during **DSCWoC**.
